subcodes.first_line: The answer - and there is none comparable unto Him - is that a wise one is content with a mere hint, and hath no need of either speaker or transmitter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الجواب و لم یکن له کفوا احد العاقل یکفیه الاشاره و لایحتاج الی قائل و ناقل
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
